query:
INSERT INTO transition_training_requirements (courseId, courseName, courseDescription, durationHours, passingScore, sequenceOrder, category) VALUES
('CTR-101', '1099 Tax Obligations', 'Understanding quarterly estimated taxes, self-employment tax, deductible expenses, and tax planning strategies for independent contractors.', 2.00, 80.00, 1, 'tax_compliance'),
('CTR-102', 'Professional Invoicing & Billing', 'Creating professional invoices, payment terms, tracking receivables, and using the L.A.W.S. Business OS invoicing system.', 1.50, 80.00, 2, 'business_operations'),
('CTR-103', 'Understanding Contract Terms', 'Reading and negotiating contracts, key clauses to watch for, liability limitations, and intellectual property considerations.', 2.00, 85.00, 3, 'legal'),
('CTR-104', 'Independent Contractor vs Employee', 'Legal distinctions between IC and employee status, IRS classification tests, maintaining proper IC relationship, avoiding misclassification.', 2.50, 90.00, 4, 'legal'),
('CTR-105', 'Business Entity Formation', 'Choosing the right business structure (LLC, S-Corp, etc.), state registration requirements, operating agreements, and compliance.', 2.00, 80.00, 5, 'business_operations'),
('CTR-106', 'Business Banking & Financial Separation', 'Opening business accounts, separating personal and business finances, bookkeeping basics, and financial record keeping.', 1.50, 80.00, 6, 'financial'),
('CTR-107', 'Business Insurance Requirements', 'General liability, professional liability, workers comp considerations, and insurance requirements for contractors.', 1.00, 75.00, 7, 'legal'),
('CTR-108', 'L.A.W.S. Business OS Platform Orientation', 'Complete walkthrough of the L.A.W.S. Business OS platform including invoicing, contract management, and network features.', 2.00, 85.00, 8, 'platform')
